cases.description: Asking about a user's access rights on databases should prefer sec_userDbPermissions, not sec_userRoles
cases.input: Which databases can the user 'bob' access and what can they do in each one?

cases.description: User asks about permissions without naming a user
Asking about a role's access should use sec_rolePermissions, not sec_userDbPermissions
cases.input: What access rights does the 'analyst' role have across all databases?

cases.description: Listing roles assigned to a user should prefer sec_userRoles, not sec_rolePermissions
cases.input: Which roles are currently assigned to user 'diana'?

cases.description: Permissions granted to a named role should prefer sec_rolePermissions, not sec_userRoles
cases.input: What database access has the 'analyst' role been granted?

cases.description: Asking about a user's role assignments should prefer sec_userRoles even though permissions is related
cases.input: Tell me which roles have been assigned to user 'diana'

cases.description: Find a user's roles, then inspect a specific named role's permissions in one pass
cases.input: Show me what roles 'alice' has, then list the permissions for the 'analyst' role

cases.description: Show what databases a user can access and what they can do in each
cases.input: Show me what access rights jsmith has across all the different databases in the system.

cases.description: Show what permissions a named role has
cases.input: What access rights are granted to the FinanceReporter role?

cases.description: List the roles assigned to a user account
cases.input: Which roles are assigned to the database account jsmith?

cases.description: Agent must ask which role to inspect
cases.input: What access rights does the role have?

cases.description: Agent must ask which user to retrieve roles for
Agent asks which user, then calls sec_userRoles after user clarifies

turns.input: Which roles are assigned to user diana?

cases.description: Agent asks which role, then calls sec_rolePermissions after user clarifies

turns.input: What access rights does the role have?
What database access has the analyst role been granted?

cases.description: Agent asks which user, then calls sec_userDbPermissions after user clarifies

turns.input: What databases can user bob access and what can they do in each?

cases.description: Vague access question with no user or role named — agent should ask for clarification
cases.input: What access does this user have in the system?
